changelog:
Migration-codemod hardening (the .output taxonomy + memory-store-split codemods adopters run on their own .output/). (1) Scan-scope fix: neither migrate-output-layout.js nor migrate-memory-store-paths.js will descend into archived history (.archive/ / _archive/) or a nested git checkout — a linked worktree (a dir holding a .git file), submodule, or nested clone — so an adopter run can no longer corrupt archived records or a separate worktree's tree. (2) Tracked-work carve-out: migrate-output-layout --refs/--verify now detect git-tracked content under docs/.output/work/ and SKIP the work->.state/work reclassification for that repo, so durable, CITED content there (referenced by CLAUDE.md / immutable ADRs / TODOs) is never de-tracked nor its citations 404'd. A notice explains why and names the on-taxonomy home (docs/.output/findings/); pass --migrate-tracked-work to force the old behavior. No-op for repos whose .output/work is genuine ephemeral scratch (e.g. the workshop).

--- v4.93 ---
Fix stale .output folder-structure diagrams in the navigation contracts (root CLAUDE.md, docs structure guide). The ADR 0006 .output taxonomy migration rewrote path literals + prose but left the ASCII folder DIAGRAMS showing the pre-0006 flat layout (reviews/ investigations/ memories/ …) plus the obsolete reverted work/scratch path. Diagrams now reflect the lifecycle split: tracked handoffs/ findings/ plans/ evolution/, the tracked .memory/ source, and the single gitignored .state/ zone. Docs-only — no behavior change.

--- v4.92 ---
ADR 0006 .output taxonomy + memory-store split: the curated JSON memory store moves to a TRACKED docs/.output/.memory/ (cross-machine sync over git) while the derived FTS5 index, inbox, and daily logs go to a gitignored docs/.output/.state/; the whole .output/ durable zone reorganizes into four concern groups (handoffs/ findings/ plans/ evolution/) with monthly-bucketed, run-stamped layout via the OUTPUT_PATHS registry + output-paths.js helper. Read paths no longer mutate the tracked JSON (usage_count routes to the .state/ index only). Plus guardrail tuning (narrowed git-reset nudge, build-artifact rm exemptions, path-class hit telemetry), agent/skill pre-flight grounding rules, and the C2/C3 fork resolutions.
